general.hint_text: Break down the problem into smaller steps. Think about what the question is really asking.
general.encouragement: You're on the right track! Take your time to think through each option.
general.strategy: Read each option carefully and eliminate the ones that are clearly incorrect.

syntax.hint_text: Remember Python's syntax rules: indentation matters, no semicolons needed, and case sensitivity.
syntax.encouragement: Syntax questions test your attention to detail. You've got this!
syntax.strategy: Look for common syntax patterns you've learned.

variables.hint_text: Think about how variables are created and used in Python. No type declarations needed!
variables.encouragement: Variables are fundamental - you're building important skills!
variables.strategy: Consider the rules for variable naming and assignment.

data_types.hint_text: Python has several built-in data types: int, float, str, bool, list, dict, etc.
data_types.encouragement: Understanding data types is key to effective programming!
data_types.strategy: Think about what type of data each example represents.
